final_prompt.prompt:
Use case: interior-design-render
Asset type: architectural visualization, editorial interior photo
Primary request: a 20-square-meter Japanese wabi-sabi meditation tea room with restrained Eastern aesthetics and inner tranquility
Scene/backdrop: intimate tea room interior with skylight, bamboo forest visible through translucent shoji screens
Subject: low black walnut tea table with natural wood grain and fine cracks, several floor cushion seats, rough ceramic flower vase with dry branches and moss balls
Style/medium: architectural visualization, photorealistic interior render, wabi-sabi aesthetic
Composition/framing: wide interior shot, eye-level perspective capturing the full spatial layout and material textures
Lighting/mood: natural daylight streaming through skylight at an angle, quiet and meditative atmosphere with soft shadows
Color palette: off-white, natural wood tones, charcoal gray, moss green, earthy clay
Materials/textures: hand-fired irregular terracotta floor tiles, raw diatom mud wall texture, translucent washi paper on sliding doors, rough unglazed ceramic, natural wood grain with cracks
Constraints: preserve the 20-square-meter spatial scale, maintain wabi-sabi imperfection aesthetic, keep bamboo forest silhouette visible through shoji
Avoid: glossy surfaces, perfect symmetry, bright artificial lighting, clutter, modern furniture, vivid saturated colors
